avatars.title: Choose a Q&A avatar
avatars.subtitle: Compare how avatars speak and move with sample clips, then pick the one for your lecture. You can also create your own avatar from a photo.
avatars.loadError: Could not load avatars. Please try again shortly.
avatars.deferredBanner: The avatar API isn't deployed yet, so this is a preview with sample data. Selecting, renaming, and uploads will be saved for real once the backend is connected.
avatars.stagePlaceholder: Click an avatar below to play it large here.
avatars.stageCustomNoMotion: It's photo-based, so it shows a still image by default. Tap the button to generate a moving preview.
avatars.customAvatarHint: Upload a photo to create your own avatar and it will appear here.
avatars.previewGenerateNote: Runs one avatar render with the selected voice (takes a few dozen seconds).
avatars.voiceNote: Plays the sample voice once with the avatar clip. Click to replay or pick another voice.
avatars.voiceNoteCustom: Your avatar speaking with the selected voice.
avatars.voiceChangeNeedsRerender: Voice changed. Tap '▶ Regenerate with this voice' below and the avatar will speak in it (takes a few tens of seconds).
avatars.voiceUnsupported: This browser does not support voice preview.
avatars.voiceSampleText: Hello. I will teach this lecture with this voice.
avatars.applySuccess: Avatar applied to the lecture. Returning to the editor.
avatars.applyError: Could not apply the avatar to the lecture.
avatars.applyHintNoLecture: Enter from the lecture editor via 'Change avatar' to apply your selection directly to a lecture.
avatars.builderCreateHint: Pick both a look and a voice ('Use for avatar' in the library, 'Use this voice for the avatar' below).
avatars.useForBuildDone: Set as the look for your avatar. Pick a voice, then finish with 'Create avatar (look + voice)'.
avatars.voiceUseForBuildDone: Set as the voice for your avatar. With a look, finish with 'Create avatar (look + voice)'.
avatars.useForAvatar: Use this voice for the avatar
avatars.usingForAvatar: ✓ In use for the avatar · click to cancel
avatars.sampleVoiceDescription: Sample voices you can use instead of your own cloned voice. Only one — your own voice or a sample voice — can be 'used for the avatar'. Tap ▶ to preview and ★ to favorite.
avatars.sampleVoiceFavEmpty: No favorited voices yet. Add with ★ or search to pick one.
avatars.recentApplyNote: Apply to this lecture instantly — no re-generation (zero cost).
avatars.libraryDescription: Avatars and looks you've created. Pick one to select and apply instantly — no re-generation.
avatars.buildStudioDescription: Builds a talking avatar from your chosen look and voice right here. Test it with a script in the chat below, and when you're happy press 'Apply this avatar to the lecture'. Once applied, this avatar answers student questions (from pre-rendered cached replies).
avatars.buildChangeHint: To change the look or voice, re-select above and press 'Build avatar with look & voice' again.
avatars.buildApply: Apply this avatar to the lecture
avatars.buildApplyNeedsRender: Build and check the avatar first.
avatars.scriptTestDescription: Check how your Q&A avatar (chosen look + voice) actually speaks by entering any sentence. When you're happy, apply it to the lecture with 'Build avatar with look & voice' at the top right.
avatars.scriptTestChatNote: Type what the avatar should say and press 'Speak this script' to render it speaking in your look and voice (same text + voice replays instantly, no re-render).
avatars.scriptTestDefault: Hello, I'm the professor for this course. Today we'll work through the core concepts step by step.
avatars.scriptTestPlaceholder: Enter the script for the avatar to speak.
avatars.scriptTestRenderingHint: This usually takes 30–90 seconds. Please keep this open.
avatars.scriptTestFailed: Failed to render the avatar video. Please try again shortly.
avatars.scriptTestApplyHint: Changed the look or voice? Press 'Speak this script' again to check. When you're happy, apply it with 'Build avatar with look & voice' at the top right.
avatars.cardDeleteConfirm: Remove this item from your library? This can't be undone.
avatars.cardDeleteError: Could not delete. Please try again shortly.
avatars.renameError: Could not update the avatar name.
avatars.renameHintNoLecture: Names are saved per lecture. Please enter from the lecture editor.
avatars.lookRenameError: Could not save the look name. Please try again shortly.
avatars.uploadTitle: Create an avatar from your photo
avatars.uploadDescription: Upload a front-facing upper-body photo to generate an avatar of yourself. Generation can take a few minutes.
avatars.uploadStatusProcessing: Generating your avatar. It will appear at the top of the list when ready.
avatars.uploadStatusFailed: Avatar generation failed. Please try a different photo.
avatars.uploadInvalidType: Only image files (JPG, PNG) can be uploaded.
avatars.uploadTooLarge: The photo must be 25MB or smaller.
avatars.uploadPreviewAlt: Preview of the uploaded profile photo
avatars.voiceUploadTitle: Create a voice from your own voice
avatars.voiceUploadDescription: Upload an audio file (mp3) of your own voice to clone it. The cloned voice appears as "My voice" in the voice list on the right, so your avatar can speak in your own voice.
avatars.voiceUploadStatusReady: Your voice is ready. Select it in the voice list on the right to build a preview.
avatars.voiceUploadStatusFailed: Voice creation failed. Please try a different file.
avatars.voiceUploadInvalidType: Only audio files (mp3, m4a, wav, ...) can be uploaded.
avatars.voiceUploadTooLarge: The audio file must be 25MB or smaller.
avatars.voiceUploadHint: Works best with a clean ~1-minute sample of just your voice, with no noise or background music.
avatars.voiceReadyHint: Select it in the voice list to build a preview.
avatars.voicePreviewError: Preview synthesis failed. Please try again in a moment.
avatars.voiceCloneHint: Upload an audio file to create your own voice and it will appear here.
avatars.recordHint: Read clearly for about a minute in a quiet place. Stop to play it back, then 'Create my voice' to register it.
avatars.recordDenied: Microphone access was denied. Allow the microphone in your browser's site permissions and try again.
avatars.recordInsecure: Recording requires a secure connection (HTTPS). Open the site over localhost or https and try again.
avatars.recordNoDevice: No microphone was found. Check that a mic is connected and try again.
avatars.recordDeviceBusy: The microphone is unavailable. Check whether another app is using it and try again.
avatars.recordEmpty: Nothing was recorded. Check your mic input and record a little longer.
avatars.recordUnsupported: This browser doesn't support in-browser recording. Please load an audio file instead.
avatars.recordError: Something went wrong while recording. Please try again.
avatars.scriptError: Could not load the script. Please try again shortly.
avatars.scriptHint: Reading the script above while recording produces a closer-sounding voice.
avatars.scriptMockNote: This is a sample script — once the script API is connected, it will be generated for your lecture topic and language.
avatars.studioPhotoTooLarge: The photo must be 20MB or smaller.
avatars.savedDescription: Your saved avatars — each a look paired with a voice. Apply one to any lecture instantly, no re-generation (zero cost). Build a preview clip and the card plays your avatar actually speaking.
avatars.savedEmpty: No saved avatars yet. Check a look and voice in 'Build avatar — performance check' above, then press 'Save this avatar' to collect them here.
avatars.savedApplyHintNoLecture: Enter from the lecture editor to apply this avatar to a lecture directly.
avatars.saveAvatarError: Could not save the avatar. Please try again shortly.
avatars.deleteConfirm: Remove this avatar from your gallery? This can't be undone.
avatars.deleteAvatarError: Could not delete. Please try again shortly.
avatars.previewFailed: Failed to build the preview clip. Please try again.
avatars.previewError: Could not start building the preview clip. Please try again shortly.
